decks.description: An agent-focused deck with espionage and support cards that leverages S.H.I.E.L.D. themed creatures and equipment to control the board.
A healing-focused deck with support creatures that emphasize protection and recovery through spells and enchantments.
A diverse defensive deck with creatures that provide versatility and enchantments that control the board. Features legal-themed characters and tactical support for a balanced gameplay.
A creature-focused deck with Wakandan heroes and protective instants that enhances creatures while controlling the board with removal and detention effects.
Aggressive military-themed deck featuring soldiers and combat-focused creatures with support spells for teamwork and strikes.
Creature-focused deck with equipment and auras that empower heroes like Captain America, featuring protective spells and artifacts to enhance combat prowess.
A focused deck with creatures that can target and eliminate enemies, supported by instants like Stunning Shot and Sudden Strike for precise removal and direct damage.
Spider-themed creatures with tactical instants and web-based control, featuring small utility creatures and spells like Thwip! and Spectacular Tactics.
A diverse creature-focused deck featuring Marvel heroes with supporting enchantments and one instant, providing versatile gameplay with various heroic characters.
A creature-heavy deck focused on powerful heroic characters with tactical instants and enchantments that boost the team's effectiveness in combat.
A synthezoid and android-focused deck with control elements, using creatures that interact with spells and enchantments for disruption.
A cunning blue-based deck filled with tricksters and villains, focused on control and deceptive plays through spells and abilities.
Spell-heavy deck focused on intelligent creatures with card advantage and utility spells that bounce and enhance the board.
Artifact-heavy deck focused on Iron Man and his allies, with support artifacts and enchantments to enhance the strategy.
A creature-focused deck featuring underwater and sea-themed characters with evasive flying creatures and limited disruption effects for a streamlined aggressive strategy.
Creature-focused deck with instant-speed tricks and blink effects to temporarily remove creatures from the battlefield, utilizing flash and teleportation mechanics.
This deck focuses on size-changing mechanics with small creatures that can be grown and shrunk, featuring Ant-Man and Wasp characters that leverage the Pym Particles theme.
Flying-focused deck with evasive creatures and tempo spells to control the air and dominate from above.
A time-manipulation focused deck with cards centered around temporal effects and key Marvel time-traveling characters. The deck plays with various time lords and effects to control the game.
A deception and control-focused deck featuring sneaky creatures and tricks that disrupt opponents' strategies.
A HYDRA-focused deck with powerful agents and conspirators that uses removal and infiltration effects to control the game.
A powerful creature-focused deck featuring a diverse array of villainous characters with removal and control elements to eliminate threats and seize control of the game.
A graveyard-focused deck with undead and reanimation effects that brings creatures back from the dead for repeated value.
Crime-focused deck with powerful crime lords and criminal enterprise synergies. Uses spot removal and portal effects to control the game.
A weapon-focused aggressive deck with artifact equipment synergies. Features armed warriors equipped with various artifacts to deal increased damage.
A small efficient creature-focused deck with targeted removal spells, featuring assassins and combat-oriented creatures that deliver lethal damage quickly.
A creature-heavy aggressive deck featuring diverse villain characters with targeted removal and artifact support for relentless damage.
A creature-focused deck with powerful individuals and some utility spells, designed to leverage a mix of small team members and removal/control effects.
Control-focused deck with targeted removal and tutoring. Features sacrifice outlets and efficient threats including Doctor Doom.
A creature-heavy artifact deck focused on Ultron robots and drones with support from enchantments and instants for removal and board control.
Big creatures with direct damage spells and powerful threats, focusing on aggressive red creatures and burn for tempo-based gameplay.
Fast creatures with haste and speed effects to win quickly. Features multiple speedster characters with enchantments like Super Speed and Pick Up the Pace to accelerate the game.
A lightning-focused deck with powerful creatures like Thor and Loki that deals damage through instant spells and enchantment synergies.
A young team focused on diverse abilities and synergies with multiple young heroes and tactical support spells.
A mid-range deck focused on combat-oriented creatures with some burn and utility spells, featuring thematic Daredevil characters and a dinosaur man for additional power.
A creature-focused deck with hired heroes that leverages combat triggers and removal to control the battlefield.
A creature-focused deck featuring Spider-themed characters with some direct damage and support spells to enable a diverse cast of heroes.
Fast and aggressive deck that attacks with artifact creatures and vehicles, featuring evasion and direct damage.
A creature-focused deck featuring the Runaway characters with instants and sorceries for tempo and removal, featuring diverse red spells and a single mana-fixing land.
A spell-focused deck with Young Avengers creatures and direct damage instants. The deck uses burn spells and enchantments to control the board and finish opponents.
This deck features animal creatures with some token generation and combat support, playing creatures with synergistic effects.
A deck focused on big aggressive creatures and combat effects, using powerful stomp-style cards to overwhelm opponents with large threats.
Giant-themed deck focused on big creatures with size-manipulation effects and combat tricks to make your creatures even larger.
A versatile green deck with a mix of creatures and enchantments that enhance them, featuring mana fixing and removal spells for adaptability.
A creature-focused deck with utility instants and enchantments that benefits from a diverse team of quirky heroes with various abilities.
Big green creatures focused on Hulk characters that grow through size-boosting effects and enchantments.
A focused combat deck with martial artists and trained warriors, backed by punishing effects and restoration. Features creature-heavy offense with targeted removal and resilience.
A mutant-focused deck with strong creatures and enhancement spells. Features powerful X-Men characters with support enchantments for scaling and combat bonuses.
A dinosaur-focused deck with big creatures and mana acceleration, featuring powerful dinosaurs and a modest amount of spell support.
A resilient creature-focused deck with modest board presence and utility enchantments for sustained pressure and versatility.
A multicolor deck themed around the Fantastic Four with a four-card game-winning combo, featuring the iconic heroes and their signature spells.
